name: Can I get sanctions for their AEO abuse?

mainEntity.name: Can I get sanctions for their AEO abuse?

acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, courts impose sanctions for tactical overuse, as in NY Google case.**[1]

Even partial fixes don't excuse initial abuse.[1]

- **Monetary**: Common penalty.[1]
- **Pattern evidence**: Reviews, delays.[1]
- **Broader**: Any confidentiality.[1]

Motion with timeline; seek fees.
